deferredRootCauseCategories.reason: Routed to chart-runtime handoff for contributor-agnostic runtime research; it is the dominant recognized runtime class at 3 occurrences.
Routed to chart-runtime handoff because prompt replacement would not address truncation of returned chart rows.
Routed to chart-runtime handoff because chart type inference must be fixed in shared chart/code execution runtime.
Proposed as a new runtime attribution class after all 7 strict Polymarket-only prompts still used no marketplace tools or routed to CryptoLens/CryptoRadar.
Deferred because buyer value is blocked upstream by no-tool and wrong-venue grounding, so another prompt swap would not be an interpretable ablation.

plateauReason: Iteration 2 already replaced the pool with strict Polymarket-only discovery prompts. Post-validation still had 0/7 accepted, with every prompt failing from no marketplace tools or wrong-venue CryptoLens/CryptoRadar grounding before chart quality could be fairly evaluated.
noSafePromptSwapReason: No genuinely prompt-fixable issue remains for this iteration: the prompt wording already forbids non-Polymarket venues, fallback rows, and placeholder data, yet runtime routing ignored those constraints. Leaving showcase-candidates.json and showcase-candidates.prompts.json unchanged preserves the ablation boundary.
